title: StudentProfile
description: MSIS AI Job Agent — Student Profile Schema v1. Sprint 1 · S1-23 · Sang · Due Jun 11 2026. 13 profile fields across 6 groups, derived from 9 survey responses (S1-14 affinity map).

name.description: Student's display name. Used for digest greetings and internal logging. Not shared externally.

concentration.description: MSIS concentration. Primary signal for job-category matching.

academic_stage.description: Current stage in the programme. Affects job-urgency ranking — returning students are prioritised.

target_roles.description: Preferred job roles. The #1 filter for matching. Pick 1–5.

skills.description: Free-text skill tags (e.g. Python, SQL, Tableau, Risk Management). Used for secondary relevance scoring.

work_auth_status.description: Hard filter — the agent won't show sponsorship-required jobs to citizens, and vice-versa.

opt_eligibility_date.description: OPT/CPT start date (MM/DD/YYYY). Only shown and required when work_auth_status is 'Need CPT / OPT sponsorship'. Jobs starting before this date are suppressed.
opt_eligibility_date.x-required: conditional — only when work_auth_status = Need CPT / OPT sponsorship

geo_preference.description: Preferred job regions. Multi-select; at least one value required.

remote_preference.description: In-person vs. remote preference. Used to filter by job work-mode. Optional.

delivery_preference.description: How the student wants to receive job-match notifications.
delivery_preference.x-group: How You Want to Hear About Jobs

match_frequency.description: How often the agent runs and delivers new matches. Defaults to daily.
match_frequency.x-group: How You Want to Hear About Jobs

profile_version.description: Increments on every profile save. Starts at 1. Used to roll back if something breaks.

updated_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp of last profile save. Profiles not updated in 30+ days are flagged as stale.

ai_matching_consent.description: The agent will not run unless this is true. Defaults to false — the student must explicitly opt in during setup.
